hypothesis_readiness.H1_engagement_decline: partial — 4 records testable within events window; descriptive only
hypothesis_readiness.H2_billing_friction: REFRAME REQUIRED — 0 unpaid invoices; test invoice amount and tenure instead
hypothesis_readiness.H3_support_escalation: testable — 24 tickets across 11 of 15 pro accounts; descriptive only

known_caveats: n=5 churned accounts — findings are directional/descriptive only, no statistical significance
Events window 2025-03-07 to 2025-06-06 — H1 restricted to canceled_at >= 2025-04-06 (4 of 7 records)
0 unpaid invoices — H2 reframed to invoice amount and tenure
Plan values are lowercase in DB (pro/free/enterprise), not title-case
1 of 7 canceled subscriptions has no invoice history
required_query_adjustments: H1 engagement filter: canceled_at >= '2025-04-06' for churned accounts
H2 reframe: invoice amount and tenure, not unpaid rate
